temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A woman in a leopard-print top and a red skirt lies in bed, screaming in terror. Her eyes are wide with fear as she looks up, clutching a pillow to her chest. The scene is chaotic and dimly lit, with a greenish, sickly hue. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tone of horror and suspense, introducing a character in a state of extreme distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Terrified, panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, jarring musical sting accompanies the scream.)
(00:02-00:05) A rapid montage of horror scenes flashes on screen. A man in a dark suit crawls desperately through a dark, narrow space. The scene then cuts to a high-angle shot of a person buried up to their neck in dirt inside a dark, earthen pit, with only their head and shoulders visible. (Storyline: This montage introduces multiple elements of danger and mystery, suggesting themes of entrapment, pursuit, and survival.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A fast-paced, percussive, and suspenseful musical score plays throughout the montage.)
